items.content: Plataforma de Gestão Escolar (PGE): This is the school's official platform for grades, attendance, and communication with parents. Maria uses it daily to update student records and post assignments.

Portal Educacional Domínio Público: Maria frequently accesses this site for classic Brazilian literature and historical texts to supplement her lessons. It's a valuable resource for finding public domain works.

WhatsApp Group - Clube do Livro Quinzenal: This group is for communication and coordination with members of her book club. They discuss upcoming reads, meeting logistics, and share book recommendations.
Google Drive - Material de Aula: Maria stores all her lesson plans, presentations, and student handouts here. She organizes them by grade level and subject for easy access and sharing.
Receitas Bahianas Tradicionais (Blog): This personal blog is her go-to for authentic Bahian recipes. She uses it for cooking inspiration and to ensure accuracy when sharing dishes with friends.
USP Letras Alumni Network: This online portal connects her with former classmates and professors from USP. She uses it for professional networking and to stay updated on academic trends.
Samba Dance Studio Schedule: Maria checks this schedule weekly to plan her samba classes. It helps her balance her teaching, studies, and hobbies.
